data.current_description: Captures a screenshot of a webpage or raw HTML content. Returns the image directly, or a JSON response with CDN URL when json=true.
data.description_suggestion: Captures a screenshot of a webpage or raw HTML content using query parameters. Requires API authentication via access token. Returns the screenshot image directly in binary format by default, or a JSON response containing the CDN URL and metadata when json=true parameter is set. Supports 28 configurable parameters for controlling capture dimensions, viewport settings, rendering options, and output format.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on authentication requirements, specific output formats, and parameter scope. Added details about authentication, binary vs JSON response modes, and parameter count to help AI agents understand input/output expectations and when to use this endpoint.

data.current_description: Captures a screenshot using JSON or form-encoded body parameters. Accepts the same parameters as the GET endpoint.

Accepts the same 27 configurable parameters as the GET endpoint through the ScreenshotRequest schema. Preferred for complex configurations or sensitive parameters.
